name: Aqua Gestão Codespaces
postCreateCommand:
python -m pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt && mkdir -p .streamlit && python - <<'PY'
import os, json
from pathlib import Path
raw = os.environ.get('GCP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON', '')
if raw:
    data = json.loads(raw)
    lines = ['[gcp_service_account]']
    for k, v in data.items():
        v = str(v).replace('\\', '\\\\').replace('\n', '\\n').replace('\r', '\\r').replace('"', '\\"')
        lines.append(f'{k} = "{v}"')
    Path('.streamlit/secrets.toml').write_text('\n'.join(lines) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
    print('secrets.toml gerado a partir de GCP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON')
else:
    print('GCP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON não encontrado; secrets.toml não gerado')
PY
